entry.title: IDC 70CDCR20D00000007 (P00010) awarded to CORECIVIC, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: ENFORCEMENT AND REMOVAL OPERATIONS SAN DIEGO

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: Task orders against this Contract may also be awarded by the U.S. Marshals service.

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MODIFICATION IS TO ADD CLINS ODC TO PURCHASE PERSONAL PROTECTIVE EQUIPMENT (PPE) FOR EMPLOYEES OF CORECIVIC, INC. FOR COVID-19.

ns1:contingencyHumanitarianPeacekeepingO.description: PRESIDENTIAL ISSUED EMERGENCY DECLARATION, OR A MAJOR DISASTER DECLARATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
